title: Recruiter Compensation And Process Questions
summary: Recruiter-safe handling for compensation, package expectations, working model, relocation, and hiring-process questions.

verification.notes: Aligned with the existing recruiter benchmark record and deterministic operational answer patterns already implemented.

claims: Compensation answers should avoid unverified numbers and depend on role, location, scope, seniority, responsibilities, and package.
Working-model and relocation answers should stay flexible and recruiter-safe.
Process answers should route recruiters to direct contact with Joz.
proof_points: Recruiter benchmark rules define compensation, working-model, and relocation handling.
Existing operational facts provide the direct contact path.
